sources.name: Greenhouse (Miro)
sources.poll_method: GET the board JSON endpoint; each company board is one slug (here 'miro'); paginate via the returned jobs array
sources.notes: Public board API, no key required. needs_slug is true because the company board token must be supplied per target company.

sources.name: RemoteOK
sources.poll_method: GET the JSON feed; first element is a legal/metadata notice, skip it; filter the rest by tags and posted date
sources.notes: Whole-board remote feed; set a descriptive User-Agent. Remote-only, so best for remote-EU target geography.

sources.name: Adzuna
sources.poll_method: GET the country search endpoint (here 'pt' for Portugal) with app_id and app_key query params; paginate via the trailing page number in the path
sources.notes: Occupation-agnostic multi-country aggregator; part of the universal backbone. Free tier needs an app_id/app_key pair — see needs_key. Country code in the path is led by base_country.

sources.name: Upwork RSS
sources.poll_method: Fetch the saved-search RSS feed; each item is one posting; dedupe by the item GUID before extracting
sources.notes: Freelance/contract postings via a public saved-search RSS feed; the q parameter carries the search terms. Best for freelance contract_type workspaces.
